hero_title: Practical Automation & Robotics Consulting for SMEs

problem_title: Automation is Expensive When Done Wrong
problem_body: Many small and mid-sized businesses know automation could improve efficiency - but struggle to answer:
problem_q4: How do we avoid costly mistakes?
problem_note: We help you answer those questions before major investments are made.
services_sub: Practical services focused on ROI, efficiency, and lower implementation risk.
services_card_1_sub: Identify the highest-ROI automation opportunities in your business.

why_sub_1: Led by a senior software architect with 8+ years building distributed enterprise systems, scalable integrations, and event-driven platforms.
why_sub_2: We combine technical depth with practical ROI-focused consulting - bridging business needs and modern automation technologies.
why_sub_3: Specializing in the software, integration, orchestration, and systems architecture layer behind modern automation initiatives - from WMS and ERP connections to fleet orchestration and real-time data pipelines.

process_step_1: Understand your operations and current challenges.
process_step_2: Analyze workflows and identify automation opportunities.
process_step_3: Deliver practical recommendations with ROI estimates.
process_step_4: Assist with prototyping, architecture, and vendor coordination.
